title: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea

notes: Launch-ready Grade 7 card with reading, vocabulary, journals, writing, questions, informational text, and assessments.
Created from local 7th grade source folder audit.
Source folder includes 24 chapters in markdown plus a complete vocabulary file.

weeks.title: Week 25: Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea Part 1 (Days 121-125)

vocabulary: Exploration: define, use in context, and connect to the reading
text evidence: choose and explain a quotation
academic discussion: compare ideas across chapters
journal: What does this week's reading show about Exploration? Use a detail from the text.
Which character choice, setting detail, or conflict feels most important this week? Explain why.
writing: Write an evidence paragraph about character, setting, or conflict.
Revise one answer by adding a stronger quotation and clearer reasoning.
questions: What is the main conflict or question in this section?
How does the author use setting, dialogue, or action to reveal character?
Which quotation best supports your interpretation?
How does this week connect to the larger theme of the card?
assessment: Weekly vocabulary check and comprehension response.
Review day: discuss questions, revise writing, and prepare for the next section.
